product: Updated UI navigation for Databricks Apps
tagline: The Databricks Apps console has a redesigned interface that provides a more intuitive app management experience.
what_it_does: The Databricks Apps console has a redesigned interface that provides a more intuitive app management experience. The updated console streamlines workflows for editing, deploying, and monitoring apps. You can also access Databricks Apps directly from the app switcher in the top right corner of your workspace.
why_it_matters: Apps run on the serverless platform and integrate with key platform services, including Unity Catalog for data governance, Databricks SQL for querying data, and OAuth for authentication.
plain_summary: The Databricks Apps console has a redesigned interface that provides a more intuitive app management experience. The updated console streamlines workflows for editing, deploying, and monitoring apps.

capabilities.desc: Create and deploy your first app.

capabilities.desc: Learn about core concepts, including app structure, resources, state, and authorization.
